data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Conditional visibility (show only if X is true)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions conditional visibility as a need, but it does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate that this functionality is implemented. Therefore, a gap exists in the evidence regarding the validation of this specific requirement.
gaps: Conditional visibility (show only if X is true) is not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
